colB: Standalone steady-state continuous stirred tank reactor based on ASM2d-TSN
20 effluent component targets and 20 influent component references
Mechanistic rates evaluated directly; no artificial clipping or rate ceiling
COD\csvcomma{} TN\csvcomma{} TP\csvcomma{} and TSS computed with $I_{comp}$
Nonlinear least squares under box constraints
Variable\csvcomma{} residual\csvcomma{} and gradient tolerances of $10^{-9}$
Global cap of 25 times the target retained-row count
20-day stiff backward differentiation formula dynamic relaxation if two steady-state initializations fail
Maximum absolute residual no greater than $10^{-9}$
